findings.description: The source file's table of contents lists 15 sections, but the knowledge file covers only 4 (s1–s4). Sections 5–15 are entirely absent: `how_to_numbering_sequence`, `using_ThreadContext`, `using_TestDataParser`, `using_junit_annotation`, `using_transactions`, `using_ohter_class`, `how_to_assert_property_from_excel`, `tips_test_data`, `how_to_express_empty_line`, `how_to_change_master_data`, `how_to_change_test_data_dir`. Although the source text is truncated in the provided excerpt, the ToC confirms 11 additional substantive sections exist and are not represented in the knowledge file.

The Java code example showing how to retrieve the fixed system time via `SystemRepository.getObject("systemTimeProvider")` and `provider.getDate()` is omitted. This demonstrates the retrieval API that test code uses alongside the configuration.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains: `SystemTimeProvider provider = (SystemTimeProvider) SystemRepository.getObject("systemTimeProvider"); Date now = provider.getDate();`
